meaning: n.议事法规专家,国会议员adj.议会的
examples: He is a veteran parliamentarian whose views enjoy widespread respect.
And a court slapped a big fine on an opposition newspaper for slandering a parliamentarian.
Berlusconi was also criticised by Italy's only black parliamentarian Jean Leonard Touadi, who is of Congolese origin.
Ultimately, the Senate parliamentarian will decide whether the Democrats' play is within the rules.
At around three in the afternoon, an Icelandic parliamentarian named Birgitta Jonsdottir walked in.
